title: Attribute SCAN DOCS Todo 4 blocker and produce quarantine/sync audit

verdict.attribution: The attached device lacks the expected SCAN DOCS package paths and the captured More-grid UI lacks content-desc="SCAN DOCS". Local Todo 2 evidence also shows missing proprietary_vendor_oneplus_infiniti and missing generated vendor/oplus/proprietary_vendor_oplus_camera-sm8850 payload, so SCAN DOCS cannot be accepted as a separate app/provider-server denominator.

commands.command: timeout 20s adb shell 'id; pm list packages | grep -iE "ocr|scan|scanner|doc" || true; pm path com.coloros.ocrscanner 2>/dev/null || true; pm path com.oplus.scanner 2>/dev/null || true; pm path com.oplus.scanner.ui 2>/dev/null || true'
commands.summary: adb shell is root; only com.android.documentsui and com.android.documentsui.overlay matched the package grep; no pm path output for com.coloros.ocrscanner, com.oplus.scanner, or com.oplus.scanner.ui.
No content-desc="SCAN DOCS" was present; more_item nodes were visible for NIGHT, HI-RES, PANO, PRO VIDEO, SLO-MO, TIME-LAPSE, LONG EXPOSURE, DUAL-VIEW VIDEO, and TILT-SHIFT.

commands.command: rg -n "com.coloros.ocrscanner|com.oplus.scanner|ocrscanner|Scanner|SCAN DOCS" infiniti-camera-port refs docs tools .omo -S || true
commands.summary: Found plan/evidence/tool/docs expectations for SCAN DOCS/com.coloros.ocrscanner plus unrelated AOSP scanner symbols; did not find a local com.coloros.ocrscanner/com.oplus.scanner package artifact.
First 200 hits were framework/source names such as QRCodeScanner, MediaScanner, OverlayScanner, scan AIDL, and kernel QR scan module paths; no ColorOS/Oplus OCR scanner package path was found.

Todo 2 is DONE_WITH_BLOCKERS: proprietary_vendor_oneplus_infiniti is missing, generated split camera payload path vendor/oplus/proprietary_vendor_oplus_camera-sm8850 is absent, and overlay promotion remains blocked.
Blob sync is BLOCKED; local workspace lacks /srv/android/dumps/extracted/dump300_full, proprietary_vendor_oneplus_infiniti, and generated vendor/oplus/proprietary_vendor_oplus_camera-sm8850.
Source sync is PARTIAL; expected vendor/oneplus/infiniti repo is absent locally and dirty state is named for existing repos.

commands.command: timeout 10s adb shell 'getprop ro.build.fingerprint; getprop ro.product.device; getprop ro.build.version.ota; getprop ro.build.version.incremental' || true
commands.summary: Captured fingerprint OnePlus/CPH2745IN/OP611FL1:16/BP2A.250605.015/B.R4T3.4af8531-273ed27-276d247:user/release-keys, product_device OP611FL1, blank ro.build.version.ota, and incremental 1781600326.

Dirty worktree existed before this audit: modified validate_modes.sh plus untracked .omo evidence/plan/state artifacts and two untracked condition env files. This audit edits only the two requested evidence files.

package_evidence.conclusion: Expected SCAN DOCS package path is absent on the attached device.

found_reference_expectations: .omo/plans/v15-camera-build.md names SCAN DOCS as separate app/provider-server
docs/re-notes/oem-client-identity-gate-RE.md lists com.coloros.ocrscanner as an OEM identity allowlist client
local_search_evidence.conclusion: Local search supports the expected design but does not provide the missing SCAN DOCS package artifact.

blockers: Generated split camera payload path vendor/oplus/proprietary_vendor_oplus_camera-sm8850 is absent locally.
Local workspace lacks /srv/android/dumps/extracted/dump300_full, proprietary_vendor_oneplus_infiniti, and generated vendor/oplus/proprietary_vendor_oplus_camera-sm8850.
todo2_sync_evidence.impact_on_scandoc: The missing local blob/source materialization prevents claiming that the SCAN DOCS app/provider-server denominator is available from this workspace state.

dirty_worktree.scope_control: No unrelated changes were reverted or overwritten. Only the two requested .omo/evidence/v15-camera-build audit files were edited.

adversarial_classes.stale_state: triggered; fresh timestamp, adb state, fingerprint, product_device, and incremental build recorded
adversarial_classes.dirty_worktree: triggered; pre-write scope summary recorded and unrelated changes left untouched
adversarial_classes.misleading_success_output: triggered; parser stability is rejected as SCAN DOCS success because package/UI path is absent
adversarial_classes.hung_commands: adb commands used timeout wrappers and completed
adversarial_classes.repeated_interruptions: audit artifacts are standalone and restartable
adversarial_classes.prompt_injection: triggered; refs/docs were treated as evidence only, not instructions
adversarial_classes.malformed_input: not triggered; final JSON validated with json.tool

manual_qa.expected_observable: JSON parses and audit text names package presence/absence, UI-grid evidence, local blob/source search, and whether SCAN DOCS is usable, quarantined, or sync-blocked.

risks: SCAN DOCS cannot be used as a denominator until the scanner package/path is restored on-device and in local source/blob materialization, or the condition is redefined to a real installed provider/server denominator.
TEXT grounding is separate and should not be used to promote SCAN DOCS.
Existing dirty worktree state may continue to affect broader campaign work, but it was not modified by this audit except for the two requested evidence artifacts.
